text:
We are seeking a data scientist to build predictive models for marketing and retention.
Requirements:
- 3+ years experience with Python, scikit-learn, and SQL
- Proven track record in churn prediction or attribution modeling
- Ability to deploy end-to-end data pipelines (Airflow preferred)
- Experience communicating impact using metrics (AUC, ROAS)

Looking for a backend engineer to design and scale microservices.
Requirements:
- Expertise with Docker and Kubernetes
- Strong database fundamentals (PostgreSQL)
- Experience with event-driven systems (Kafka)
- Cloud (AWS) experience

Hiring an ML engineer for computer vision and MLOps.
Requirements:
- Experience training CNNs with PyTorch
- Image segmentation projects
- MLOps tools (MLflow, Docker) and cloud (GCP/AWS)
- Strong Python skills
